code:
import io
import string

fn parse_two(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        if not has
          has = true
          cur = 0
        end
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      else if b == 45 and not has
        neg = true
        has = true
        cur = 0
      else
        if has
          if neg
            cur = -cur
          end
          if count == 0
            nums = [cur, 0]
          else if count == 1
            nums = [nums.get(0).ok_or(0) , cur]
          end
          count = count + 1
          has = false
          neg = false
          cur = 0
        end
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      cur = -cur
    end
    if count == 0
      nums = [cur, 0]
    else if count == 1
      nums = [nums.get(0).ok_or(0), cur]
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let nums = parse_two(input)
  let a = match nums.get(0) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let b = match nums.get(1) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let r = a * a + b * b
  print("r=#{r}")
end
